body_template: Two miles on, the path bends past the low water. Greenway Cross lies {miles_to_next} ahead.
{character} passes through the green commons. Fenwick Rise climbs {miles_to_next} on.
The high turn of the route — nearly seven miles walked. Rushmere waits {miles_to_next} ahead.
Still water below the crags. Just {miles_remaining} left to Cragmouth Gate.
{character} reaches the canyon shore — {total_miles} walked from Fernhollow to the reservoir gate.
